source.name: Mad Games (v2.32)
source.description:
Mad Games is a fun multiplayer game consisting of various mini-games: starting with the classical "Murder" round and finishing off with a GIANT LAZER CAT BOSS! By collecting or buying the ruby currency, you can customize your gear and select the mini-games / rounds you want to play!

@VeryMadStudio on Twitter
/MadStudioGames on Facebook

Be sure to check out other Roblox games by Mad Studio!
The Mad Murderer 2: https://www.roblox.com/games/1026891626/The-Mad-Murderer-2
Mad Paintball 2: https://www.roblox.com/games/289565045/Mad-Paintball-2-v0-07
